news-korea-econ.title: Communists, Democrats use #NoKings rally to call for May Day strike: 'Shut it down'
news-korea-econ.description: Communists chanted for revolution and May Day strikes from New York to Minnesota, as the "No Kings" movement sees a growing ideological shift to more radical rhetoric
